pageContext.name: Decepticon Faction Bookend
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Icon Heroes presents the Decepticon Faction Bookend from Transformers! Featuring the evil Decepticon logo, this polystone bookend measures approximately 6.2 H x 5.8 W x 2.9 D. Split them apart to hold and display your books, Blu-Ray Discs, DVDs, and more! Till all are one.
